title: rinorea umbricola
intro: Rinorea umbricola, also known as the "forest violet" or "umbrella vine", is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rinorea umbricola include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Rinorea umbricola can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
